languages.text: "Я отказываюсь называть служителей Золотого Трона врагами, и тем более — объяснять причины, по которым я с ними сотрудничаю".
"I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."
languages.original_text: "Я отказываюсь называть служителей Золотого Трона врагами, и тем более — объяснять причины, по которым я с ними сотрудничаю".

traits.locale_text: "I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."
"I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."
"I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."

languages.text: «Me niego a considerar enemigos a los sirvientes del Trono Dorado, y tampoco pienso explicar mis motivos para cooperar con ellos».
languages.original_text: "I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."

traits.locale_text: «Me niego a considerar enemigos a los sirvientes del Trono Dorado, y tampoco pienso explicar mis motivos para cooperar con ellos».

languages.text: “我不愿将黄金王座的仆人称作敌人，更不愿解释我与他们合作的理由。”
languages.original_text: "I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."

traits.locale_text: “我不愿将黄金王座的仆人称作敌人，更不愿解释我与他们合作的理由。”

languages.text: « Je refuse de traiter les serviteurs du Trône d'Or en ennemis, et plus encore d'expliquer les raisons qui m'ont incitée à coopérer avec eux. »
languages.original_text: "I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."

traits.locale_text: « Je refuse de traiter les serviteurs du Trône d'Or en ennemis, et plus encore d'expliquer les raisons qui m'ont incitée à coopérer avec eux. »

languages.text: "Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarına düşmanlarım demeyi reddediyorum, onlarla iş birliği yapma nedenlerimi açıklamayı ise asla kabul etmem."
languages.original_text: "I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."

traits.locale_text: "Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarına düşmanlarım demeyi reddediyorum, onlarla iş birliği yapma nedenlerimi açıklamayı ise asla kabul etmem."

languages.text: "Ich weigere mich, die Diener des Goldenen Throns als Feinde zu bezeichnen und werde Euch gewiss nicht erklären, warum ich mit ihnen zusammenarbeite."
languages.original_text: "I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weigere mich, die Diener des Goldenen Throns als Feinde zu bezeichnen und werde Euch gewiss nicht erklären, warum ich mit ihnen zusammenarbeite."

languages.text: 「黄金の王座の臣下を敵と呼ぶことは、ましてや協力する理由を説明するなど、私は断固拒否する」
languages.original_text: "I refuse to call the servants of the Golden Throne my enemies, much less explain my reasons for cooperating with them."

traits.locale_text: 「黄金の王座の臣下を敵と呼ぶことは、ましてや協力する理由を説明するなど、私は断固拒否する」
